results.title: Inside Virat Kohli's 311 games ODI career: Has he ever missed a complete series because of an injury?
results.description: To put this period of absence into perspective, looking back at historical records highlights an incredible validation of his career longevity. From the moment he debuted on the international stage back in 2008, there has been no documented case of Kohli missing a complete bilateral series or a significant tournament for the national team solely because of a physical ailment.

results.title: Seth Jarvis scores in overtime, Carolina beats Vegas in Game 2 to tie Stanley Cup Final
results.description: The Hurricanes beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 in Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final on Thursday night to the series.

results.title: FIFA's World Cup pre-match ceremony overhaul shows football is becoming as much about spectacle as sport
results.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 will have a new fan-centric pre-match ceremonies which the global body hopes will transform the matchday experience, but it's also an attempt to turn the games into a spectacle.
